entities.woman: a woman in a white apron
entities.boy: a boy in a green t-shirt
entities.apples: a pile of bright red apples

scenes.title: The Market Stall
scenes.background_prompt: An outdoor fruit market stall with a striped red and white awning, wooden crates arranged on a table, and a cobblestone ground with a puddle reflecting the stall. Bright daylight. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An outdoor fruit market stall on a bright day. A woman in a white apron over a floral dress stands behind a wooden table, arranging fruit with both hands. On the table, a large pile of bright red apples glistens in the sunlight on the left, a basket of green pears sits in the center, and a bunch of yellow bananas hangs from a hook on the right. A boy in a green t-shirt and denim shorts stands in front of the stall, pointing eagerly at the red apples with one hand. A striped awning in red and white stretches above the stall, casting dappled shadows. The cobblestone ground has a small puddle that reflects the awning and the colorful fruit. Other market stalls are faintly visible in the background.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman behind the wooden table, standing and arranging fruit. Place apples as a large pile on the left of the table, bright red and glistening. Place boy in front of the stall, standing and pointing eagerly at the red apples.
